pi.name: Ilia Sucholutsky
pi.bio: Faculty Fellow/Assistant Professor, NYU Center for Data Science. Incoming Assistant Professor, Department of Computer Science, Purdue University.

members.name: Ayush Rajesh Jhaveri
members.bio: I’m a Master’s student in Computer Science at NYU Courant. My research focuses on reasoning in large language models, particularly on improving hypothesis exploration, with inspiration from cognitive science.
members.fun_fact: Always up for a game of soccer! Love cooking Thai food.
